hero.name: Le Vinh Ky
hero.description: Building scalable data pipelines and cloud-native solutions. Passionate about transforming raw data into actionable insights.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Get to know me better
about.description: I'm a Data Engineer at FPT Software with a passion for building robust data infrastructure and cloud solutions. I specialize in designing and implementing scalable data pipelines, working with AWS cloud services, and transforming complex data into meaningful business insights.
about.description2: With a strong foundation from the University of Information Technology (UIT), I combine academic knowledge with hands-on experience to deliver efficient, production-ready data solutions.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Let's work together
contact.description: I'm currently open to new opportunities and collaborations. Whether you have a question or just want to say hi, feel free to reach out!
